name: @reineira-os/x402-rss-monorepo
description: Reineira Settlement Standard (RSS) + x402 insured-settlement adapter

scripts.compile: pnpm --filter @reineira-os/rss run compile && pnpm --filter @reineira-os/x402-contracts run compile
scripts.test:contracts: pnpm --filter @reineira-os/rss run test && pnpm --filter @reineira-os/x402-contracts run test
